workspaces.name: salesforce
workspaces.description: Salesforce workspace with router-first execution, scope-safe validation, and specialist skills for Apex, LWC, Flow, integrations, and refactors.

skills.name: sf-router-core-mandatory
skills.description: Mandatory first-hop router for Salesforce requests.

skills.name: sf-session-scope-lock
skills.description: Locks Salesforce and Git execution context per session.

skills.name: sf-general-analysis-planning
skills.description: Handles non-mutating analysis, planning, and estimation tasks.

skills.name: sf-discovery-impact-map
skills.description: Maps Salesforce impact scope before implementation.

skills.name: sf-apex-standard-scaffold
skills.description: Implements Apex changes with fixed scaffolds and guardrails.

skills.name: sf-lwc-slds-first
skills.description: Implements LWC work using SLDS-first principles.

skills.name: sf-aura-legacy-maintenance
skills.description: Maintains Aura artifacts in legacy-safe mode.

skills.name: sf-flow-metadata-scope
skills.description: Implements Flow and metadata changes with strict scoping.

skills.name: sf-integration-serviceagent
skills.description: Implements Salesforce integrations using service-agent patterns.

skills.name: sf-refactor-governance
skills.description: Governs scoped refactors with explicit risk control.

skills.name: sf-validation-dryrun-targeted
skills.description: Runs targeted validation and dry-run commands only.

skills.name: sf-git-safe-delivery
skills.description: Governs safe Git delivery flow for Salesforce work.

skills.name: md-session-scope-lock

skills.name: md-general-analysis-planning
skills.description: Handles non-mutating analysis, planning, and estimation tasks.

skills.name: md-discovery-impact-map
skills.description: Maps implementation impact before mobile or desktop changes.

skills.name: md-electron-desktop-feature
